title: Transaction sending for Allora SDK (build/sign/simulate/broadcast/confirm)
description: Add proper transaction-sending to allora-sdk-go on top of the colleague's rigorous Wallet + Privy RemoteSigner branch (tani/ENGN-8456). Build on the ROOT-LEVEL draft (tx.go/tx_builder.go/signer.go/wallet.go/remote_signer.go), NOT the untracked tx/ package (older, sloppier, duplicates the signer abstraction + re-registers its own codec + spins a raw CometBFT client per broadcast). Reuse the existing rigorous pooled query infra: broadcast/simulate/gettx via cosmosrpc.ClientPool.Tx() (gen interfaces.TxClient, health-tracked + retried via pool.ClientPoolManager, go-utils/errors wrapping, config.CallOpt). Query account number/sequence via .Auth().Account. Keep alloracodec.CosmosCodec() as the single codec. Interface-package discipline throughout: contract in parent, impls in subpkg, static var _ Iface = (*impl)(nil) checks, NopXxx for optional deps, ctx through every I/O boundary, errors wrapped with go-utils/errors, panic on invariant violations. ENV: repo pins go 1.25.1 via .mise.toml; use the mise toolchain (ambient shell go is 1.26.x and will fail to build).

title: Generalize tx builder to arbitrary sdk.Msg with msg-agnostic sender guard
description: Today tx_builder.go only builds banktypes.MsgSend and the sender-match guard in signTx special-cases *banktypes.MsgSend. Generalize: (1) add an unsigned-tx builder accepting []sdk.Msg + TxParams (keep CreateUnsignedSendTx as a thin back-compat wrapper); (2) replace the MsgSend type-assertion sender guard with a msg-agnostic check using the codec GetMsgV1Signers / msg.GetSigners so ANY message type is verified against the signer address (the existing TODO in signTx calls for exactly this). Keep alloracodec.CosmosCodec() and the existing authtx.NewTxConfig path. Preserve all typed-nil guards (isNilSigner/isNilPubKey), two-phase build/sign semantics, and the 19 existing tx_test.go tests MUST stay green. Add table-driven tests for multi-msg and non-bank-msg sender guard (match and mismatch).

title: Tx package architecture: TxClient interface in parent, pooled impl in subpkg
description: Establish the package shape per brynsk interface-package discipline. Define a TxClient/TxManager INTERFACE in the parent (the tx contract: build+sign, simulate/estimate gas, broadcast, wait-for-confirm, account-info) with its concrete impl in a subpackage. The impl depends on cosmosrpc.ClientPool (which exposes .Tx() interfaces.TxClient and .Auth() interfaces.AuthClient) injected as an interface; do NOT construct raw CometBFT clients. Add static var _ Iface = (*impl)(nil) checks. Optional deps (logger, clock for polling) wired via NopXxx / constructor, no nil-checks-as-guards. ctx flows through every method doing I/O. Errors wrapped with github.com/brynbellomy/go-utils/errors. Reconcile the untracked cosmosrpc/cosmos_rpc.go (currently points at the old tx.TxManager) to point at the new design. This bead defines the seams; T3/T4/T5/T7 fill them in.

title: Account-info fetch (account number + sequence) via cosmosrpc Auth()
description: Fetch account number + sequence for a signer address by calling cosmosrpc.ClientPool.Auth().Account (interfaces.AuthClient), unpacking resp.Account via alloracodec (NOT a freshly-constructed interface registry as the untracked tx/manager.go does; reuse the single shared codec so registered account types stay in sync). Return a clear error when the account is not found on-chain (unfunded/never-seen account), the common first-tx failure. ctx-aware. Table-driven tests against a mocked AuthClient (mockery v3, mocks/ subdir).

title: Gas estimation via Tx().Simulate with gas-adjustment + fee calculation
description: Replace the untracked draft's hardcoded per-message-type gas table with real simulation: call cosmosrpc.ClientPool.Tx().Simulate (interfaces.TxClient) on the unsigned tx, read GasInfo.GasUsed, apply a configurable gas-adjustment multiplier (default ~1.5), and compute the fee from a gas price / fee-tier policy. Keep a static fallback estimate only when simulation errors, logged via structured zerolog. Fee-tier/gas-price types may be salvaged from the untracked tx/types.go (FeeTier, GetGasPrice) but live in the new package. ctx-aware; errors wrapped with go-utils/errors. Table-driven tests against a mocked TxClient covering simulate-success, simulate-error-fallback, and adjustment math.

title: Broadcast + confirmation through pooled Tx() (BroadcastTx + GetTx polling)
description: Broadcast signed tx bytes via cosmosrpc.ClientPool.Tx().BroadcastTx (interfaces.TxClient) using the SDK's pooled, health-tracked, retried path; do NOT spin up a raw CometBFT rpcclient per call like the untracked tx/broadcast.go. Support broadcast modes (sync/async/block as the cosmos tx service exposes). Wait-for-confirm by polling Tx().GetTx with a ctx-bounded loop + a clock (go-utils clock for testability), NOT time.After; honor ctx cancellation/deadline. Surface a structured TxResult (hash, height, code, gas wanted/used, raw log, events). Decode tx hash correctly (compute from bytes for sync mode). Errors wrapped with go-utils/errors; non-zero code returns a typed tx error. Table-driven tests against a mocked TxClient + fake clock (no real sleeps).
